3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>

Start your heading structure with h1

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (244 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4><strong>Hva koster det?</strong></h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (255 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Tips en venn" class="toollink tipslink tipslinkicon" href="#" onclick="location.href='/stoettekontakt.291081.no.html?showtipform=2#tips'; return false;" title="Tips en venn"> <!-- <img
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Skriv ut" class="toollink printlink printlinkicon" href="#" onclick="window.print(); return false;" rel="nofollow" title="Skriv ut"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-print.png" wi
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.facebook.com/lebesby.kommune.no/" target="_blank"><span class="show-for-sr">Facebook</span><i class="fi-social-facebook"></i></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (251 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="logo cell small-8" href="/" id="logolinkmobile"> <img alt="Lebesby kommune logo" class="rs_skip logoimg" id="logomobile" src="https://img8.custompublish.com/getfile.php/4366107.848.aqmjtklss
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Start your heading structure with h1

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="title">Kontakt</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

MODERATE

<h3>Webkameraet er sponset av</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)

MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Twitter" class="toollink shareonlink twitter" href="#" onclick="return twitThisTwo(document.title, '', location.href, 3);"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-twitter.png" alt="Del
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'

MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Tips en venn" class="toollink tipslink tipslinkicon" href="#" onclick="location.href='/tt-ordningen-transporttjeneste-for-funksjonshemmede.291085.no.html?showtipform=2#tips'; return fal
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'

MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

https://www.lebesby.kommune.no/tjenester.83669.no.html
Avvik: 237 | Bestått: 347
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
